name: SignalCode
headline: Contrast-forward code color language
summary: A vivid, high-recognition color philosophy for active coding and faster syntax scanning.
positioning: A sharper companion line to HearthCode for users who prefer stronger landmarks and more energized editing sessions.

variantPhilosophy.dark: Flagship dark climate with the clearest syntax landmarks and strongest product identity.
variantPhilosophy.darkSoft: Lower-stimulation night version that keeps Signal's energy without turning muddy.
variantPhilosophy.light: Bright studio daylight with firm structure pop and cleaner contrast than Hearth Light.
variantPhilosophy.lightSoft: Approachable light climate that stays lively rather than paper-soft.

constraints.thermalBaseline: cool-neutral substrate with warm and yellow-green signal peaks
constraints.allowWarmPressure: yes, but only at high-signal roles
